join_order.notes: Build dense adsh->filtered_sub_idx lookup once; during one sequential pass over num, apply uom/value predicates and direct lookup to route rows into per-thread aggregates.

data_structures.aggregation: thread_local direct_array(filtered_sub_cardinality) with final compact_hash_map rollup for (name,cik) and cik

optimization_notes: Root cause is a physical access-pattern mismatch: probing filtered adsh posting lists drives cache-miss-heavy random reads into num.value/num.uom (working set >> 88MB LLC), so main_scan remains dominant. Strategy Category B/A: replace posting-driven probes with one fused sequential fact pass over num.adsh/uom/value, use a dense adsh->filtered_sub_idx direct lookup from filtered sub(fy=2022), and keep cache-friendly thread-local direct-array aggregation before a small final rollup for HAVING and top-k.
